calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Andotion To Compel Deft To Appear For Deposition, 2025.450
Off Calendar Nov-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kenneth W. Jenner, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Innovistech Properties
Marelyn Monroe, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona

After hearing, Plaintiff's motion to compel Defendant to appear for Deposition is GRANTED. Defendant to appear for deposition on Nov. 26, 2008 at 1 PM. Order was signed in open court.COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
